charts.title: UTG first-in Jam — 8bb
charts.notes: 6-max first-in (unopened) jam from UTG at 8bb effective, 5 players behind. Chip-EV Nash (no ICM) via fictitious play: actor jams or folds, each player behind calls a Nash range. Equal stacks => single pot. Jams 23.6% of hands. Later positions jam wider (fewer players behind); ranges shrink as stack grows. Independent-caller + tie approximations (study-grade).

charts.title: SB call vs UTG jam — 8bb
charts.notes: SB calling a 8bb first-in jam from UTG (6-max, chip-EV Nash). Calls 10.8% — tighter when other players are still behind (overcall risk) and as the jam stack grows.
